title: Urochloa notochthona
intro: There is not enough information in the public domain about Urochloa notochthona.
parts: Urochloa notochthona is a species of grass, and information about its medicinal parts is limited. However, in some traditional practices, the roots and leaves of certain Urochloa species are used for their perceived health benefits, such as treating fever and respiratory issues. More research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Urochloa notochthona as a medicinal plant. In general, the plant is not widely recognized as a source of medicinal compounds. Further studies are required to understand the potential medicinal properties of Urochloa notochthona.
side_effects: Unfortunately, I don't have information on the side effects of Urochloa notochthona.
